subcodes.first_line: O Ali! We verily were witnesses unto those who consulted regarding thy Cause, and among them was such as pronounced disbelief in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قد کنا شهدآء علی الذین یشاورون فی امرک و منهم من قال انه کفر بالله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
